W = W f r # 322 (3T) tfRRsT 3-5-1984 3. ^ W f ¥ ^ ° 863 (3T) clrfRa 22-11-'1985 4. W W f r ^ 700 (3T) TTrfRsT 15-6-1988 5. W W f t ° ^ f ° 1057 (37) TTrtRS 3-11-1988 6. W *fiT° ft0 V° 999 (37) T1RT75 26-12-1990 8 9 10 11 12 13 14, W ^ t > *T° 69 (37) TTRR5T 11-2-1991 W ^T° t > # 304 (37) Wfm 7-6-1991 W =fil° +> # 444 (37) TfRTGT 30-4-1992 W ^T° ft0 "W> 111 (31) flrfRsT 22-2-1994 W W f r f f 612 (37) fllflm 9-8-1994 ( W ^\a t > ^ 731 (37) ?trfR9 30-9-1994 W ^fcT 7> # 57 (3?) ^RR§ 7-2-199S MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th September, 1995 G.S.R. 633 (E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that the use of the following fixed dose combinations, comprised of drugs, are likely to involve risk to human beings or the said fixed dose combinations do not have the therapeutic value claimed or purported to be claimed for them or contain ingredients and in such quantity for which there is no therapeu- tic justification and it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale and distribution of the said fixed dose combinations in public interest; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 26-A of the Drugs and Cosmetic Act, 1940 (23 of 1*540), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare No. G.S.R. No. 578 (E), dated the 23rd July, 1983, namely :— In the Table appended to the said notification, after serial No. 52 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and the entries shall be added, namely:— "53. Fixed dose combination of Oxyphenbutazone or Phynylbutazone with any other drug. 54. Fixed dose combination of Analgin with any other drug other than antispasmodics. 55. Fixed dose combination of dextropropoxyphene with any other drug other than anti-spasmodics and/or non- steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDS). 56. Fixed dose combination of a drug, standards of which are prescribed in the Second Schedule to the said Act with an Ayurvedic, Siddha or Unani drug." fNo. X-11014/2/95-DMS&PFA] INDRAJITCHAUDHURI, Addl. Secy. Foot Note ;—The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide GSR No. 578(E) dated 23-7-83 and subsequently amended by :— GSR No. 49(E), dated 31-M984 GSR No. 322(E), dated 3-5-1984 GSR No. 863(E), dated 22-11-1985 GSR No. 700(E), dated 15-6-1988 GSR No. 1057(E), dated 3-11-1988 GSR No. 743(E), dated 10-8-1989 GSR No. 999(E), dated 26-12-1990 8.
